extension.name: signal-dark
extension.author: The AI Director
extension.description:
Signal Dark — a dark editorial template built entirely by AI — TheAIDirector.Win

Violet/cyan accent palette. Space Grotesk typography. Reading progress bar. Full magazine layout with 36 module positions. Every component view styled for dark mode — articles, categories, contacts, tags, search, news feeds, and Kunena forum.

Designed to be edited conversationally in VS Code with Claude Code — describe what you want, it reads the template, writes the CSS, and deploys the change. No manual coding required.

Browse the demo →

field.name: positionMap
field.label: Position Manager
field.description: Each box is a module position. Click the device icons to toggle visibility: green = visible, red = hidden. The arrows control stacking order on mobile — higher numbers push a position further down when the layout collapses to a single column. Changes take effect when you save.

field.name: fontService
field.label: Font Service
field.description: Where to load the template fonts from. Google and Bunny serve the same fonts; Bunny is GDPR-friendly (no Google tracking). Adobe requires a Typekit kit ID. Local uses your own files in /media/templates/site/signal-dark/fonts/.

field.name: adobeFontsKitId
field.label: Adobe Fonts Kit ID
field.description: Your Typekit kit ID — the short alphanumeric code from use.typekit.net/KITID.css

field.name: logoText
field.label: Logo Text
field.description: The text shown in the top-left corner and footer of the site. Use <span> to wrap the accent word.

field.name: showHero
field.label: Show Hero Section
field.description: Display the hero banner on the homepage. Turn off to use a module-only homepage layout.

field.name: showHeroTagline
field.label: Show Tagline
field.description: Display the eyebrow tagline above the hero title.

field.name: showHeroTitle
field.label: Show Hero Title
field.description: Display the main hero heading.

field.name: showHeroSubtitle
field.label: Show Hero Subtitle
field.description: Display the descriptive text below the title.

field.name: heroSubtitle
field.label: Hero Subtitle
field.default: Deep analysis, practical prompts, and working scripts for people who want to actually use AI — not just talk about it.

field.name: showHeroCta
field.label: Show Primary CTA Button
field.description: Display the primary call-to-action button.

field.name: showHeroSecondaryCta
field.label: Show Secondary CTA Button
field.description: Display the secondary (ghost) call-to-action button.

field.name: showHeroStats
field.label: Show Hero Stats
field.description: Display the stats counters (articles, categories, etc.) below the CTA buttons.

field.name: heroImage
field.label: Hero Background Image
field.description: Optional background image for the hero section. Leave empty for the default gradient.

field.name: heroHeight
field.label: Hero Height
field.description: Height of the hero section.

field.name: heroLayout
field.label: Hero Layout
field.description: How the hero content and image are arranged.
field.option: Image on right, text on left

field.name: heroImageFit
field.label: Hero Image Fit
field.description: How the background image fills the hero area.

field.name: heroImagePosition
field.label: Hero Image Position
field.description: Which part of the image to anchor when cropping.

field.name: heroOverlayOpacity
field.label: Hero Overlay Darkness
field.description: How dark the overlay is on top of the image. Higher = darker, more readable text.

field.name: stickyHeader
field.label: Sticky Header
field.description: Keep the main navigation fixed at the top when scrolling.

field.name: stickySubnav
field.label: Sticky Sub-navigation
field.description: Pin the secondary nav bar below the header when scrolling.

field.name: showNavCta
field.label: Navigation CTA Button
field.description: Show the call-to-action button (e.g. Downloads) in the top-right corner of the header bar.

field.name: showNavSearch
field.label: Navigation Search Icon
field.description: Show the search icon in the top-right corner of the header bar. Requires a Search module in the 'search' position.

field.name: blockLinks
field.label: Clickable Article Cards
field.description: Make entire article cards clickable instead of just the title link. Applies to article list modules on the homepage.

field.name: roundedImages
field.label: Rounded Article Images
field.description: Apply subtle rounded corners to article images (intro images, full-text images, and inline figures).

field.name: linkHoverBg
field.label: Link Hover Background
field.description: Show a subtle background highlight when hovering over links in article lists and sidebar modules.

field.name: showNewsletter
field.label: Show Newsletter Section
field.description: Display the newsletter signup section on the homepage.

field.name: newsletterSubtitle
field.label: Newsletter Section Subtitle
field.default: New articles, prompt packs, and scripts — delivered when they're ready. No filler.

field.name: kunenaShowLastPost
field.label: Kunena: Last Post Column
field.description: Show or hide the Category / Last Post column headers and Last Post data on Kunena forum index pages. Has no effect if Kunena is not installed.

field.name: kunenaShowPostHeader
field.label: Kunena: Post Topic Header
field.description: Show or hide the 'Re: Topic Title' line above each reply in Kunena forum threads. Has no effect if Kunena is not installed.

field.name: kunenaLockOnce
field.label: Kunena: Lock Notice Once
field.description: When enabled, 'The topic has been locked' only appears on the last post instead of every post. Has no effect if Kunena is not installed.

field.name: kunenaTemplateFont
field.label: Kunena: Use Template Font
field.description: Override Kunena's default Segoe UI with the template body font (Inter). Has no effect if Kunena is not installed.

field.name: jceDarkPreview
field.label: JCE: Dark Preview
field.description: Style the JCE Preview tab to match the template's dark theme. When off, the preview uses the default Joomla backend styling. Note: TinyMCE's frontend editor does not render properly with dark templates — JCE is strongly recommended. Has no effect if JCE is not installed.

field.name: kunenaPostGlow
field.label: Kunena: Post Hover Glow
field.description: Show a subtle violet glow when hovering over forum posts. Has no effect if Kunena is not installed.
